description_long: This is an ornate, classical-style vase with a deep cobalt blue body and a tall, elegant profile. The vase features a wide, flared spout and a single, high-arching handle in a golden color, which attaches at the neck and shoulder. The body is decorated with intricate white relief figures and motifs, including mythological scenes and stylized animals, reminiscent of ancient Greek or neoclassical ceramics. The base is faceted and sturdy, providing stability, while the neck is narrow and transitions smoothly into the wider body. The interior of the vase and the underside of the spout are also finished in gold, adding a luxurious contrast to the blue and white exterior. The overall craftsmanship and decorative detailing suggest it is intended as a display piece in a refined urban setting.
description: A tall, cobalt blue vase with a gold handle and spout, adorned with white classical relief figures and motifs. The vase has a faceted base and a luxurious, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold handle, flared spout, and a prominent white relief figure in motion on the blue body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large white mythological animal motif and the handle curving behind the vase.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a reclining white figure and the full arc of the gold handle.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle's attachment and minimal decoration, showing the vase's smooth blue surface.
attribute_pattern: classical mythological scenes and animal motifs
